commits.message: [agent:engineer][task:ops-0014] fix CI submodule checkout for test and review workflows
commits.author: engineer

handoff_notes: Review found that the test/review workflows were not safe in a clean clone because submodules were not checked out recursively and metrics-collector was missing from .gitmodules. Commit e610a39 fixes both issues. Awaiting GitHub Actions validation on the review-complete branch before closing the task.
review_notes: Review on the merged clean checkout found a real CI defect: submodule-backed paths were empty in a clean clone, but tests.yml and review-agent.yml used plain checkout without recursive submodules. metrics-collector also lacked a .gitmodules entry. Commit e610a39 fixes the clean-clone CI path. Task should remain in review until the triggered GitHub Actions run on branch agent/rook/ops-0014-review-complete is confirmed.
